title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Xpressbees International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Xpressbees International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Join the Xpressbees International Enterprises family as a Category Manager in Faridabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Xpressbees International Enterprises:
Xpressbees International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees International Enterprises!
